message:
Remove Python 3.10 and 3.11 support

The minimum Python version is now 3.12. The CI test matrix now covers
Python 3.12 and 3.13. All tooling (ruff, black, mypy) targets Python 3.12.

Also initializes changelog infrastructure using tenzir-changelog.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2,9 +2,9 @@ name: Test
 
 on:
   push:
-    branches: [ main ]
+    branches: [main]
   pull_request:
-    branches: [ main ]
+    branches: [main]
 
 permissions:
   contents: read
@@ -15,37 +15,37 @@ jobs:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     strategy:
       matrix:
-        python-version: ["3.10", "3.11", "3.12"]
-    
+        python-version: ["3.12", "3.13"]
+
     steps:
-    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
-    
-    - name: Install uv
-      uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v4
-      with:
-        enable-cache: false
-    
-    - name: Set up Python ${{ matrix.python-version }}
-      run: uv python install ${{ matrix.python-version }}
-    
-    - name: Lint with ruff
-      run: |
-        uv run --extra dev ruff check src tests
-    
-    - name: Format check with black
-      run: |
-        uv run --extra dev black --check src tests
-    
-    - name: Type check with mypy
-      run: |
-        uv run --extra dev mypy src
-    
-    - name: Test with pytest
-      run: |
-        uv run --extra dev pytest --cov=security_lake_tools --cov-report=xml
-    
-    - name: Upload coverage
-      uses: codecov/codecov-action@v3
-      with:
-        file: ./coverage.xml
-        fail_ci_if_error: false
\ No newline at end of file
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Install uv
+        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v4
+        with:
+          enable-cache: false
+
+      - name: Set up Python ${{ matrix.python-version }}
+        run: uv python install ${{ matrix.python-version }}
+
+      - name: Lint with ruff
+        run: |
+          uv run --extra dev ruff check src tests
+
+      - name: Format check with black
+        run: |
+          uv run --extra dev black --check src tests
+
+      - name: Type check with mypy
+        run: |
+          uv run --extra dev mypy src
+
+      - name: Test with pytest
+        run: |
+          uv run --extra dev pytest --cov=security_lake_tools --cov-report=xml
+
+      - name: Upload coverage
+        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v3
+        with:
+          file: ./coverage.xml
+          fail_ci_if_error: false

@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+id: security-lake-tools
+name: Tenzir Security Lake Tools
+description: Utilities for working with Amazon Security Lake
+repository: tenzir/security-lake-tools

@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+---
+title: Remove Python 3.10 and 3.11 support
+type: change
+authors:
+- mavam
+- claude
+created: 2025-12-05T23:49:39.81377Z
+---
+
+The minimum Python version is now 3.12. The CI test matrix now covers Python 3.12 and 3.13.

@@ -7,7 +7,7 @@ name = "security-lake-tools"
 version = "0.2.1"
 description = "Tools for managing AWS Security Lake custom sources"
 readme = "README.md"
-requires-python = ">=3.10"
+requires-python = ">=3.12"
 license = {text = "Apache-2.0"}
 authors = [
     {name = "Tenzir", email = "engineering@tenzir.com"},
@@ -19,9 +19,8 @@ classifiers = [
     "Intended Audience :: System Administrators",
     "License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License",
     "Programming Language :: Python :: 3",
-    "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.10",
-    "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.11",
     "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.12",
+    "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.13",
     "Topic :: Security",
     "Topic :: System :: Logging",
 ]
@@ -55,7 +54,7 @@ packages = ["src/security_lake_tools"]
 
 [tool.ruff]
 line-length = 100
-target-version = "py310"
+target-version = "py312"
 src = ["src"]
 
 [tool.ruff.lint]
@@ -74,10 +73,10 @@ ignore = [
 
 [tool.black]
 line-length = 100
-target-version = ["py310"]
+target-version = ["py312"]
 
 [tool.mypy]
-python_version = "3.10"
+python_version = "3.12"
 warn_return_any = true
 warn_unused_configs = true
 disallow_untyped_defs = true
